bits.premise: Growing up Mormon makes Hims ads sound like a religious solution to aging men's problems.
Getting older means friends cannot tell whether acid is a party drug or acid reflux.

lines.text: - Nothing's stuck on there.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: All right, my name's Dicky.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm from Salt Lake City, Utah, home of the Mormons.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I never realized how blessed I was to be Mormon
lines.label: setup

lines.text: until I got older and started really living that life of sin.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You see, I started seeing ads and the number one solution
lines.label: setup

lines.text: for men who like can't get hard or losing their hair
lines.label: setup

lines.text: or need to lose weight, it's called hymns.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I've been singing those Mormon hymns like a motherfucker lately.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, pray to God every time I need some chick to be into me,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I just start doing a little hum when I'm doing my business.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Just humming a little hymn.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But yeah, now I'm getting older.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My homies stop partying as much.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I actually got sober now.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We went out to eat some dinner the other day.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I told them I had acid.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Two of them were buckling up for a good time.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The other one tossed me some Pepto B.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I was like, God, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I mean, it's true, I'm capable of both.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I have the good times and I have the fucking reflux.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah, that was rough.
lines.label: fluff
